error TS6054: File 'a.mts' has an unsupported extension. The only supported extensions are '.tlua', '.tsx', '.d.tlua'.
  The file is in the program because:
    Root file specified for compilation


!!! error TS6054: File 'a.mts' has an unsupported extension. The only supported extensions are '.tlua', '.tsx', '.d.tlua'.
!!! error TS6054:   The file is in the program because:
!!! error TS6054:     Root file specified for compilation
==== a.mts (0 errors) ====
    // @see https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/44442
    local a = <T,>(arg: T): T => {
      return arg;
    };
    
    local b = <T>(arg: T): T => {
      return arg;
    };
